goals.title: Agent Execution Observability & Tracing System
goals.description: Build comprehensive logging and tracing infrastructure to monitor agent execution flow, tool invocations, and decision paths with full audit trail capabilities

goals.title: Intelligent Task Routing & Prioritization Engine
goals.description: Implement dynamic task classification and prioritization system that routes work based on complexity, dependencies, and resource availability with real-time queue management

goals.title: Self-Healing Agent Framework with Autonomous Recovery
goals.description: Develop autonomous error detection, diagnosis, and recovery mechanisms enabling agents to identify failures, attempt fixes, and escalate intelligently without human intervention

goals.title: Real-time Agent Dashboard with Live Execution Insights
goals.description: Create Next.js 14 dashboard displaying live agent execution metrics, task queues, performance analytics, and status updates with WebSocket-powered real-time synchronization
